name: Bhai Harbhajan Singh Lehri (Sri Ganganagar)
body: Bhai Harbhajan Singh Lehri was born on 20 th January 1954, in the village of Mohla, district Sri Ganganagar, Rajasthan. He completed his bachelor’s degree in music at Pracheen Kala Kendra, but his training in Kirtan was taken forward by Bhai Gurbaksh Singh Ji and Bhai Atma Singh Ji Shant.

Bhai Harbhajan Singh Ji has been performing Kirtan all across India and abroad since 1971. He served mainly in the towns of Suratgarh and Anupgarh in Sri Ganganagar. However, he has also performed Kirtan in various locations such as Mumbai, Hyderabad, Delhi, Ludhiana and others. He has travelled to approximately 15 countries including Malaysia, Singapore, Thailand, England, Canada, United States of America etc.
If anyone has more recordings or photos of Bhai Harbhajan Singh Lehri, please contact us.
